meta_title: Kara — Know exactly what you hold
meta_description: Inventory, value and understand your bars, coins and jewellery. Kara keeps your data on your device, with no Kara account or server.
hero_proof: Private by design · No Kara account
hero_body: Kara brings your bars, coins and jewellery together, measures how they evolve and keeps every detail under your control.
hero_note_soon: Coming soon to iOS and Android
inventory_body: Record a bar, coin or piece of jewellery with its weight, purity, purchase price and exact storage location.
inventory_detail: An inventory built for assets you can actually hold in your hands.
overview_title: The full weight of your holdings, made clear.
overview_body: Estimated value, acquisition cost, allocation and performance: Kara turns a scattered collection into one calm, coherent view.
overview_note: Automatic reference prices, with a value you can adjust for every object.
simulation_body: Test a scenario, adjust the quantity and compare today’s value with your acquisition cost before making a decision.
simulation_disclaimer: Indicative simulation, excluding fees and taxes. Kara does not provide financial or tax advice.
report_body: Review the complete analysis in Kara and generate a clean PDF locally, ready to archive or share when you choose.
report_note: No document is generated on a Kara server.
privacy_title: Your holdings do not belong on our servers.
privacy_body: Your inventory stays on your device and in the private space managed by your iCloud or Google account. Kara requires no account and never receives your objects, purchase prices or storage locations.
privacy_note: Reference prices are requested without attaching the contents of your inventory.
download_body: Take control of your precious metals with a private, precise application designed to last.
footer_store_legal: Apple, the Apple logo and App Store are trademarks of Apple Inc. Google Play and the Google Play logo are trademarks of Google LLC.
